title: spiraea × pumilionum
intro: Spiraea × pumilionum, also known as dwarf Korean spiraea, is a hybrid shrub derived from the cross between Spiraea chamaedryoides and Spiraea cantoniensis. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Spiraea × pumilionum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant can be consumed as a tea, taken as a tincture, or used in infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
